Loading @composition/tests/assets/TrickyVariantSelectionInVariant2_root/usda/root.usd@

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Layer Stack:
     root.usd

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Ref>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Ref
    root.usd             /Ref{v1=a}
    root.usd             /Ref{v2=b}

Variant Selections:
    {v1 = a}
    {v2 = b}

Child names:
     ['Model']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Ref/Model>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Ref{v2=b}Model

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Root>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Root
    root.usd             /Ref{v2=b}Model
